name: SpaceBattle
description: Catch Insect is a captivating puzzle game where you must carefully plan your moves to eliminate all the monsters from a distant planet. Your mission is to control and arrange missiles so that their colors match the target monsters, as only missiles of the same color can destroy them. Each level is designed with a clever layout, requiring players to think logically, choose the right attack order, and make the most of their limited turns.
